通知
代码通知
Claude can choose to notify you about important updates from a Code session.
Code permission requests
当 Claude 在 Code 会话中需要你批准运行命令时，向你发送推送通知。
Security scan emails
Get an email when a Claude Code security scan finishes.
Dispatch messages
当 Claude 在 Dispatch 中给你发消息时，向你的手机发送推送通知。

current.title: Claude Deepseek React Shell
current.bodyText:
Code with Claude anywhere

Powerful agentic coding in your IDE, terminal, or on the go. 了解更多

Terminal
Original

Best-in-class coding agent that runs in your terminal, edits files, runs scripts, and more.

npm install -g @anthropic/claude-cli
IDE extension
New

All the power of Claude Code, right at home in VS Code, Cursor, or Windsurf.

Install in VS Code
Web
预览

Run coding tasks seamlessly across your browser and phone.

Disabled by org admin

←
Back to Claude
